title: ML Engine Activation Audit — Design/Proof Sprint

existing_ml_architecture.framework: scikit-learn (RandomForest + GradientBoosting) — no external dependencies beyond sklearn+joblib

classes.TradeLabeler: Loads records from canonical ledger or training_store; labels WIN/LOSS/BREAKEVEN; extracts features. Filter: skips records without signal_scores.
classes.DeciferML: Trains classifier (WIN/LOSS binary) and regressor (pnl_pct). Uses TimeSeriesSplit for cross-validation.
classes.SignalEnhancer: Public integration class. Calls DeciferML.predict(); applies multiplier = 0.5 + win_prob to base_score. Currently disabled (ml_enabled=False).
classes.RegimeClassifier: ML-based regime detector. PRODUCTION_LOCKED=True — raises RuntimeError on predict_regime(). Not wired to production. Status: safe/dormant.
classes.WeeklyReportGenerator: Offline analytics only. Not wired to execution.

production_wiring_current_state.bot_py_line_822: imports enhance_score for availability check only (noqa: F401)
production_wiring_current_state.production_callers_of_enhance_score: NONE — no production code path calls enhance_score()
production_wiring_current_state.summary: ML engine is completely dormant. No execution path touches it.

data_readiness.note_on_legacy: All 406 eligible records predate the ml_eligible field. They are counted as eligible per count_eligible() backwards compatibility rule.
data_readiness.note_on_filter: TradeLabeler.create_dataset() skips records without signal_scores (line 247). Effective N=180, not 406.
data_readiness.note_on_canonical_ledger: data/ml/closed_trade_training_ledger.jsonl has 2 records. TradeLabeler will use it if present and non-empty, skipping training_records.jsonl. With only 2 records, MIN_TRADES gate (50) will fail and no model will be trained. This is currently safe — prevents accidental training.

existing_trained_models.inconsistency: metadata.json shows 2026-04-28 but file mtime is 2026-05-19. One of these is wrong.
existing_trained_models.leakage_detail: holding_minutes appears in feature_importance with importance=0.275 — the highest of all features. holding_minutes is the ACTUAL hold duration (post-outcome data). A model trained on it learns 'trades that were held 5 min tend to be losses' — an outcome proxy, not an entry predictor.
existing_trained_models.current_code_fix: prepare_data() correctly excludes holding_minutes from feature_cols (line 301 comment: 'determined by outcome, not entry signal'). The fix is in the code but the saved model is stale from before the fix.
existing_trained_models.action_required: Existing data/models/*.pkl must be DELETED before any activation proceeds. They must never be loaded.
existing_trained_models.scaler_mtime_inconsistency: scaler.pkl is from 2026-05-14, classifier/regressor from 2026-05-19. Components are from different training runs. Do not load any saved model until fresh retrain.

dimension_coverage.early_records_9_dims: breakout, flow, momentum, mtf, news, reversion, social, squeeze, trend
dimension_coverage.all_18_dims: adds analyst_revision, catalyst, fx_macro, fx_momentum, insider_buying, iv_skew, overnight_drift, pead, short_squeeze
dimension_coverage.zero_padding: Records predating a dimension get 0 — model learns to down-weight zero-padded features naturally

CRITICAL_inference_gap.description: SignalEnhancer.enhance_score() builds inference features WITHOUT dim_* signal scores.
CRITICAL_inference_gap.evidence: Features dict passed to predict() contains only: score, vix, holding_target, time_of_day, day_of_week, is_after_hours, regime. All 18 dim_* features default to 0 at inference.
CRITICAL_inference_gap.impact: Model trained on dim_* features predicts with all dims=0. Signal dimension information — the most differentiated input — is completely ignored at inference time. Predictions are based on score, VIX, time, and regime only.
CRITICAL_inference_gap.fix_required: enhance_score() must accept and forward signal_scores dict to predict()

leakage_risks.status: CONFIRMED in saved models; FIXED in current code
leakage_risks.action: Delete data/models/ before activation. Never load existing models.

leakage_risks.status: BUG in SignalEnhancer.enhance_score() — dims not forwarded to predict()
leakage_risks.action: Fix enhance_score() to pass signal_scores dict before activation

leakage_risks.risk: BREAKEVEN pooled with LOSS in binary label
leakage_risks.status: Design choice; 44 BREAKEVEN records (24%) count as 0
leakage_risks.action: Consider 3-class label or separate breakeven threshold; not blocking for shadow mode

leakage_risks.status: extract_features() includes these in the features dict but prepare_data() never adds them to X
leakage_risks.action: No action needed but worth documenting

leakage_risks.risk: Regime one-hot from training data leaked into prediction
leakage_risks.status: Regime is available at entry time via scanner.get_market_regime(); not a future leak

sample_size_risks.detail: Only 180 of 406 eligible records have signal_scores. The 50-trade gate was calibrated against 406 total. True training size is 180.
sample_size_risks.impact: With TimeSeriesSplit(n_splits=5), each test fold has ~36 samples. Metrics (ROC-AUC, R²) will have high variance.
sample_size_risks.recommendation: Treat N=180 as sufficient for shadow-only mode, not for advisory influence on live entries

sample_size_risks.detail: 131 of 180 usable records are TRENDING_UP or MOMENTUM_BULL
sample_size_risks.impact: Model effectively learns bull-market entry patterns. win_prob predictions in bear/choppy regimes extrapolate from 28 records combined. Boosted scores in a bear tape would be systematically wrong.
sample_size_risks.recommendation: Shadow mode only until ≥2 full regime cycles are represented

sample_size_risks.impact: TimeSeriesSplit with n_splits=5 creates folds of ~8 days each. Extremely narrow walk-forward windows. Model is essentially fitting April 2026 market conditions.
sample_size_risks.recommendation: Minimum 90 days of signal_scores-complete records before advisory activation

sample_size_risks.detail: WIN rate 28.9%; RandomForestClassifier default = class_weight=None (uniform). LOSS-biased model.
sample_size_risks.impact: Win probability predictions skewed low for all setups. Multiplier (0.5+win_prob) will systematically suppress scores below base.
sample_size_risks.recommendation: Use class_weight='balanced' or class_weight={0:1, 1:2.5} before any training

sample_size_risks.detail: multiplier = 0.5 + win_prob. If win_prob = 0.3, multiplier = 0.8, enhanced_score = base_score * 0.8. For base_score=14 (paper min), enhanced=11.2 → below threshold → entry blocked.
sample_size_risks.impact: Even with ml_can_block_entries=False, the score adjustment formula can block entries by pushing below min_score_to_trade. This is an implicit blocking path.
sample_size_risks.recommendation: For shadow and advisory stages, cap downside: enhanced_score = max(base_score * 0.9, enhanced_score). No suppression below 90% of base. Only explicit boost (>1.0 multiplier) should be permitted in early stages.

what_ml_predicts.primary: WIN probability (binary classifier) — will this trade close at a positive P&L?
what_ml_predicts.label_quality: pnl_pct available for 452/453 records — good. WIN/LOSS ratio 52:84 across usable 180.
what_ml_predicts.advisory_vs_live: Currently: neither (disabled). Proposed progression: shadow → advisory → soft influence

stage_0.name: Model Rebuild (offline only)
actions: Fix SignalEnhancer.enhance_score() to pass dim_* signal scores to predict()
Confirm training reads from training_records.jsonl (canonical ledger has only 2 records)
Verify metadata.json shows holding_minutes NOT in feature_importance
stage_0.gate_for_next: Clean model rebuilt without leakage confirmed by Amit

stage_1.name: Shadow Prediction Logging
stage_1.flag: ml_shadow_enabled (new config key, separate from ml_enabled)
actions: After IC-weighted score computed for each candidate in scan loop, call ML predict()
Write to data/ml/ml_shadow_predictions.jsonl: {ts, symbol, base_score, win_prob, expected_return, confidence, regime, dims_passed_count}
No score change. No execution change.
Dashboard: optionally show ML win_prob in candidate debug view (read-only)
stage_1.gate_for_next: 90+ shadow predictions with closed-trade outcomes; Brier score <= 0.25; top-tercile win rate > 35% (vs 28.9% baseline); Amit review

stage_2.name: Advisory Display (no score change)
actions: Show ML confidence in Apex tab / Trade Scout panel
Log discordance: cases where ML high-confidence contradicts IC-weighted score
stage_2.gate_for_next: 60+ days of shadow observation; consistent lift across >= 2 different regime types; no systematic regime-concentration bias; Amit approval

stage_3.name: Soft Score Influence (capped upside only)
stage_3.score_formula_change: enhanced_score = base_score + (base_score * max(0, win_prob - 0.5) * 0.4), clamped above at base_score * 1.2. NO DOWNSIDE. Scores cannot be reduced below base_score.
stage_3.rationale: Until the model is validated across regimes, suppress the downside risk. Only boost high-confidence setups by up to 20%.
stage_3.execution_impact: MINIMAL — can slightly increase scores for high-confidence setups; cannot block entries
stage_3.gate_for_next: Explicit Amit approval; post-Stage 2 analysis showing positive attribution

stage_4.name: Full advisory (original formula)
stage_4.gate: Explicit Amit approval only after Stage 3 validation

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_inference_passes_dim_features
tests_required_before_activation.description: Verify SignalEnhancer.enhance_score() forwards signal_scores dict to predict() and dim_* values are non-zero when signal_scores provided
tests_required_before_activation.blocks: Stage 0 — fix must be verified before any retrain

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_no_holding_minutes_in_feature_cols
tests_required_before_activation.description: Assert 'holding_minutes' not in DeciferML.prepare_data() X.columns after prepare_data()

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_stale_model_rejected_if_leaky
tests_required_before_activation.description: If loaded model's feature_names include 'holding_minutes', SignalEnhancer must disable itself and log a critical warning rather than use the model

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_ml_eligible_filter_in_training
tests_required_before_activation.description: TradeLabeler.load_trades() and create_dataset() must exclude records where ml_eligible=False

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_class_weight_balanced_in_classifier
tests_required_before_activation.description: Assert RandomForestClassifier is initialized with class_weight='balanced'

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_shadow_log_written_no_score_change
tests_required_before_activation.description: In shadow mode, verify ml_shadow_predictions.jsonl is written and the returned score equals base_score

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_shadow_mode_no_execution_path_change
tests_required_before_activation.description: Shadow mode must not affect dispatch_signals() output — same orders produced with shadow enabled vs disabled

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_enhanced_score_floor
tests_required_before_activation.description: In Stage 3 formula: enhanced_score >= base_score always. Verify with win_prob=0.0 and win_prob=0.5

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_enhanced_score_ceiling
tests_required_before_activation.description: Enhanced score does not exceed base_score * 1.2 in Stage 3 formula

tests_required_before_activation.name: test_canonical_ledger_count_used_correctly
tests_required_before_activation.description: When closed_trade_training_ledger.jsonl has < MIN_TRADES records, TradeLabeler falls through to training_records.jsonl

explicit_no_live_change_confirmation.current_session_changes: NONE — this is a design/proof audit only

open_decisions_requiring_amit_approval: Approve Stage 0: delete existing models, rebuild clean. Blocking prereq: fix SignalEnhancer dim forwarding first.
Approve shadow prediction logging (Stage 1) and where to surface win_prob in dashboard.
Set shadow gate thresholds (90 outcomes, Brier ≤ 0.25, win-rate lift) or adjust per judgment.
Decide if BREAKEVEN should be a third class or remain pooled with LOSS.
Decide score floor formula for Stage 3 (no-downside boost vs original ±multiplier).
